song.title: Hold Thou My Hand
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Hold Thou my hand; So weak I am, and helpless; I dare not take One step without Thy aid.|| Hold Thou my hand: For then, O loving Savior, No dread of ill shall make my soul afraid.
[V2] 2) Hold Thou my hand, And closer, closer draw me To Thy dear self, My hope, my joy, my all;|| Hold Thou my hand: Lest haply I should wander, And missing Thee, My trembling feet should fall.
[V3] 3) Hold Thou my hand; The way is dark before me Without the sunlight Of Thy face divine;|| But when by faith I catch its radiant glory, What heights of joy, What rapturous songs are mine!
song.author: Fanny J Crosby
